chunks.text:
Sekenkoum Real Estate

Sekenkoum is a boutique advisory firm for ultra-high-net-worth individuals and family offices, focusing on high-alpha portfolios across Emaar, Nakheel, and Danube Properties.

Tagline: Secure High-Yield Strategic Assets

Services:
- Off-plan acquisition strategies
- Investment portfolio analysis
- Golden Visa consultation
- Capital appreciation modeling
- High-yield rental asset placement

Key Areas: Dubai, UAE.

Contact Information:
- Phone: +971 58 513 0111
- Email: info@sekenkoum.com
- Website: https://sekenkoum.com/
- Address: API World Tower, Trade Center First, Dubai, UAE
- Instagram: @sekenkom_realty

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Sekenkoum Real Estate — a real estate agency in Dubai, UAE.

Company: Sekenkoum Real Estate
Location: API World Tower, Trade Center First, Dubai, UAE
Phone: +971 58 513 0111
Email: info@sekenkoum.com
Website: https://sekenkoum.com/
Instagram: @sekenkom_realty

Services: - Off-plan acquisition strategies
- Investment portfolio analysis
- Golden Visa consultation
- Capital appreciation modeling
- High-yield rental asset placement

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting the company directly at +971 58 513 0111 or info@sekenkoum.com
- Respond in the same language the user writes in
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail needed)
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to **Sekenkoum Real Estate**! How can I help you find your perfect property?
